results.title: Empathy in Medical Training: Ethics, Cadaver Dignity & Medical Education
results.description: Context: A recent controversy involving a medical student’s remarks during a stand-up comedy performance has sparked debate over medical ethics, respect for cadavers, and declining empathy in medical education. Subject: GS 4: Ethics More on News: The student allegedly made insensitive jokes about cadavers that violate the dignity of deceased bodies used for anatomical learning.... Continue reading Empathy in Medical Training: Ethics, Cadaver Dignity & Medical Education The post Empathy in Medical Training: Ethics, Cadaver Dignity & Medical Education appeared first on PWOnlyIAS .
